{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for Eneva 2024-03-31
from pprint import pprint

# Given values (from report)
price = 13.35
# shares
issued = 1584572000
treasury = 1900000
outstanding = issued - treasury

# Balance sheet (ÚLTIMO values)
ativo_total = 43090587000.0
ativo_circ = 5308501000.0
caixa_equiv = 1618617000.0
aplic_fin = 769051000.0
imobilizado = 28826708000.0
intangivel = 7237881000.0
patr_liq = 15036872000.0

# Debt (Empréstimos e Financiamentos current + noncurrent)
deb_cur = 2175410000.0
deb_noncur = 17661109000.0
div_bruta = deb_cur + deb_noncur
div_liq = div_bruta - caixa_equiv

# Quarterly and annual P&L
# Q1 2024 (ÚLTIMO) values
rev_q1_2024 = 2004692000.0  # 3.01
cog_q1_2024 = -1045621000.0 # 3.02
resultado_bruto_q1_2024 = 959071000.0 # 3.03
ebit_q1_2024 = 740268000.0 # 3.05
res_fin_q1_2024 = -707078000.0 # 3.06
pre_tax_q1_2024 = 33190000.0 # 3.07
tax_q1_2024 = 33513000.0 # 3.08 (note positive means benefit?)
net_q1_2024 = 66703000.0 # 3.09 or 3.11

# Q1 2023 (PENULTIMO quarter values for comparison)
rev_q1_2023 = 2459203000.0
ebit_q1_2023 = 753164000.0
net_q1_2023 = 222668000.0

# Annual 2023 (ÚLTIMO in previous annual report)
rev_2023 = 10090895000.0
ebit_2023 = 2672323000.0
net_2023 = 303432000.0

# TTM calculations (12 months ending 2024-03-31)
rev_ttm = rev_2023 + rev_q1_2024 - rev_q1_2023
ebit_ttm = ebit_2023 + ebit_q1_2024 - ebit_q1_2023
net_ttm = net_2023 + net_q1_2024 - net_q1_2023

# Per-share values
market_cap = outstanding * price
lpa_ttm = net_ttm / outstanding
vpa = patr_liq / outstanding

# Multiples
pl = market_cap / net_ttm if net_ttm != 0 else None
pvp = market_cap / patr_liq if patr_liq != 0 else None
p_ebit = market_cap / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm != 0 else None
psr = market_cap / rev_ttm if rev_ttm != 0 else None
p_ativos = market_cap / ativo_total if ativo_total != 0 else None

# Capital de giro = Ativo Circulante - Passivo Circulante
passivo_circ = 4204293000.0
cap_giro = ativo_circ - passivo_circ
p_cap_giro = market_cap / cap_giro if cap_giro != 0 else None

# P/Ativ Circ Liq: price divided by ativo circulante liquido per share
# definition: price divided by ativo circulante líquido por ação. We'll compute P/Ativ Circ Liq = market_cap / ativo_circ
p_ativ_circ_liq = market_cap / ativo_circ if ativo_circ != 0 else None

# EV calculations: enterprise value = market cap + dívida líquida (or + net debt?) + minority interest? Definition says EV = valor da empresa. We'll compute EV = market_cap + div_liq
enterprise_value = market_cap + div_liq
# EV/EBITDA and EV/EBIT: we have EBITDA = EBIT + Depreciação/Amortização. From statement, depreciation (7.04.01) for Q1 2024 is -348,781,000 (negative is expense). For TTM, annual depreciation 1,611,748,000 for 2023 and Q1 2024 348,781,000 and Q1 2023 415,287,000. Use TTM depre = depre_2023 + dep_q1_2024 - dep_q1_2023
dep_q1_2024 = 348781000.0
dep_q1_2023 = 415287000.0
dep_2023 = 1611748000.0
dep_ttm = dep_2023 + dep_q1_2024 - dep_q1_2023

ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm + dep_ttm

ev_ebitda = enterprise_value / ebitda_ttm if ebitda_ttm != 0 else None
ev_ebit = enterprise_value / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm != 0 else None

# LPA (earnings per share) for TTM
lpa = lpa_ttm

# VPA (book value per share) computed earlier vpa

# Margins (percentage with two decimals required)
# Marg. Bruta = Resultado Bruto / Receita Líquida (TTM)
resultado_bruto_q1_2024 = 959071000.0
resultado_bruto_2023 = 3711150000.0
res_bruto_ttm = resultado_bruto_2023 + resultado_bruto_q1_2024 - 1066921000.0 # wait Q1 2023 res bruto = 1,066,921,000 (3.03 PENULTIMO)
# But we have Q1 2023 result gross = 1066921000.0
res_bruto_q1_2023 = 1066921000.0
res_bruto_ttm = resultado_bruto_2023 + resultado_bruto_q1_2024 - res_bruto_q1_2023

marg_bruta = (res_bruto_ttm / rev_ttm) * 100 if rev_ttm != 0 else None
marg_ebit = (ebit_ttm / rev_ttm) * 100 if rev_ttm != 0 else None
marg_liq = (net_ttm / rev_ttm) * 100 if rev_ttm != 0 else None

# EBIT/Ativo = EBIT_ttm / Ativo Total
ebit_over_ativo = (ebit_ttm / ativo_total) * 100 if ativo_total != 0 else None

# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
# Fornecedores current = 552,833,000 (ÚLTIMO) per 2.01.02? Wait in ÚLTIMO, Fornecedores = 552,833,000.0
fornecedores = 552833000.0
roic = (ebit_ttm / (ativo_total - fornecedores - caixa_equiv)) * 100

# ROE = Lucro Líquido / Patrimonio Liquido
roe = (net_ttm / patr_liq) * 100 if patr_liq != 0 else None

# Liquidez Corr = Ativo Circulante / Passivo Circulante
liquidez_corr = ativo_circ / passivo_circ if passivo_circ != 0 else None

# Div Br/ Patrim = Divida Bruta / Patrimonio Liquido
divbr_patrim = div_bruta / patr_liq if patr_liq != 0 else None

# Giro Ativos = Receita Liquida (TTM) / Ativo Total
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / ativo_total if ativo_total != 0 else None

# P/EBIT, P/L, P/VP already computed per market cap
# P/Cap. Giro = market_cap / cap_giro

# Prepare results rounding appropriately
from math import isfinite

def safe_round(x, digits=2):
    if x is None: return None
    return round(x, digits)

results = {
    'outstanding': outstanding,
    'market_cap': market_cap,
    'Ativo': ativo_total,
    'Disponibilidades': caixa_equiv,
    'Ativo Circulante': ativo_circ,
    'Dív. Bruta': div_bruta,
    'Dív. Líquida': div_liq,
    'Patrim. Líq': patr_liq,
    'Receita L�edquida (12 meses)': rev_ttm,
    'EBIT (12 meses)': ebit_ttm,
    'Lucro L�edquido (12 meses)': net_ttm,
    'Receita L�edquida (3 meses)': rev_q1_2024,
    'EBIT (3 meses)': ebit_q1_2024,
    'Lucro L�edquido (3 meses)': net_q1_2024,
    'LPA': lpa,
    'VPA': vpa,
    'P/L': pl,
    'P/VP': pvp,
    'P/EBIT': p_ebit,
    'PSR': psr,
    'P/Ativos': p_ativos,
    'P/Cap. Giro': p_cap_giro,
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': p_ativ_circ_liq,
    'EV / EBITDA': ev_ebitda,
    'EV / EBIT': ev_ebit,
    'Marg. Bruta': marg_bruta,
    'Marg. EBIT': marg_ebit,
    'Marg. L�edquida': marg_liq,
    'EBIT / Ativo': ebit_over_ativo,
    'ROIC': roic,
    'ROE': roe,
    'Liquidez Corr': liquidez_corr,
    'Div Br/ Patrim': divbr_patrim,
    'Giro Ativos': giro_ativos
}

# More precise rounding for monetary full values
results_rounded = {}
for k,v in results.items():
    if v is None:
        results_rounded[k] = None
    else:
        if k in ['Marg. Bruta','Marg. EBIT','Marg. L�edquida','EBIT / Ativo','ROIC','ROE']:
            results_rounded[k] = f"{v:.2f}%"
        elif k in ['LPA','VPA']:
            results_rounded[k] = round(v,4)
        elif k in ['P/L','P/VP','P/EBIT','PSR','P/Ativos','P/Cap. Giro','P/Ativ Circ Liq','EV / EBITDA','EV / EBIT','Liquidez Corr','Div Br/ Patrim','Giro Ativos']:
            results_rounded[k] = round(v,2) if isinstance(v,(int,float)) else v
        else:
            # big monetary numbers: round to integer
            if isinstance(v,(int,float)):
                results_rounded[k] = int(round(v))
            else:
                results_rounded[k] = v

pprint(results_rounded)

# Print also variables used
print('\ncomputed variables:')
print(f'outstanding shares: {outstanding}')
print(f'market_cap: {market_cap:.2f}')
print(f'rev_ttm: {rev_ttm:.2f}, ebit_ttm: {ebit_ttm:.2f}, net_ttm: {net_ttm:.2f}')
print(f'dep_ttm: {dep_ttm:.2f}, ebitda_ttm: {ebitda_ttm:.2f}')
print(f'enterprise_value: {enterprise_value:.2f}')

# return results dict
results_rounded
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for Eneva 2024-03-31
from pprint import pprint

price = 13.35
issued = 1584572000
treasury = 1900000
outstanding = issued - treasury

ativo_total = 43090587000.0
ativo_circ = 5308501000.0
caixa_equiv = 1618617000.0
aplic_fin = 769051000.0
patr_liq = 15036872000.0

# Debt
deb_cur = 2175410000.0
deb_noncur = 17661109000.0
div_bruta = deb_cur + deb_noncur
div_liq = div_bruta - caixa_equiv

# P&L
rev_q1_2024 = 2004692000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 740268000.0
net_q1_2024 = 66703000.0

rev_q1_2023 = 2459203000.0
ebit_q1_2023 = 753164000.0
net_q1_2023 = 222668000.0

rev_2023 = 10090895000.0
ebit_2023 = 2672323000.0
net_2023 = 303432000.0

# TTM
rev_ttm = rev_2023 + rev_q1_2024 - rev_q1_2023
ebit_ttm = ebit_2023 + ebit_q1_2024 - ebit_q1_2023
net_ttm = net_2023 + net_q1_2024 - net_q1_2023

# market cap
market_cap = outstanding * price

# per share
lpa = net_ttm / outstanding
vpa = patr_liq / outstanding

# multiples
pl = market_cap / net_ttm if net_ttm != 0 else None
pvp = market_cap / patr_liq if patr_liq != 0 else None
p_ebit = market_cap / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm != 0 else None
psr = market_cap / rev_ttm if rev_ttm != 0 else None
p_ativos = market_cap / ativo_total if ativo_total != 0 else None

# P/Cap Giro
passivo_circ = 4204293000.0
cap_giro = ativo_circ - passivo_circ
p_cap_giro = market_cap / cap_giro if cap_giro != 0 else None

# P/Ativ Circ Liq
p_ativ_circ_liq = market_cap / ativo_circ if ativo_circ != 0 else None

# EV
enterprise_value = market_cap + div_liq

# Depreciation
dep_q1_2024 = 348781000.0
dep_q1_2023 = 415287000.0
dep_2023 = 1611748000.0
dep_ttm = dep_2023 + dep_q1_2024 - dep_q1_2023

ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm + dep_ttm

ev_ebitda = enterprise_value / ebitda_ttm if ebitda_ttm != 0 else None
ev_ebit = enterprise_value / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm != 0 else None

# Margins
res_bruto_q1_2024 = 959071000.0
res_bruto_q1_2023 = 1066921000.0
res_bruto_2023 = 3711150000.0
res_bruto_ttm = res_bruto_2023 + res_bruto_q1_2024 - res_bruto_q1_2023

marg_bruta = (res_bruto_ttm / rev_ttm) * 100 if rev_ttm != 0 else None
marg_ebit = (ebit_ttm / rev_ttm) * 100 if rev_ttm != 0 else None
marg_liq = (net_ttm / rev_ttm) * 100 if rev_ttm != 0 else None

# EBIT / Ativo
ebit_over_ativo = (ebit_ttm / ativo_total) * 100 if ativo_total != 0 else None

# ROIC
fornecedores = 552833000.0
roic = (ebit_ttm / (ativo_total - fornecedores - caixa_equiv)) * 100

# ROE
roe = (net_ttm / patr_liq) * 100 if patr_liq != 0 else None

# Liquidez Corr
liquidez_corr = ativo_circ / passivo_circ if passivo_circ != 0 else None

# Div Br/ Patrim
divbr_patrim = div_bruta / patr_liq if patr_liq != 0 else None

# Giro Ativos
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / ativo_total if ativo_total != 0 else None

# Rounding and packaging
from math import isfinite

def fmt_pct(x):
    return f"{x:.2f} %"

indicators = []

# Monetary / counts
indicators.append(("Ativo", ativo_total))
indicators.append(("Disponibilidades", caixa_equiv))
indicators.append(("Ativo Circulante", ativo_circ))
indicators.append(("Dív. Bruta", div_bruta))
indicators.append(("Dív. Líquida", div_liq))
indicators.append(("Patrim. Líq", patr_liq))
indicators.append(("Receita Líquida (12 meses)", rev_ttm))
indicators.append(("EBIT (12 meses)", ebit_ttm))
indicators.append(("Lucro Líquido (12 meses)", net_ttm))
indicators.append(("Receita Líquida (3 meses)", rev_q1_2024))
indicators.append(("EBIT (3 meses)", ebit_q1_2024))
indicators.append(("Lucro Líquido (3 meses)", net_q1_2024))

# multiples
indicators.append(("P/L", pl))
indicators.append(("P/VP", pvp))
indicators.append(("P/EBIT", p_ebit))
indicators.append(("PSR", psr))
indicators.append(("P/Ativos", p_ativos))
indicators.append(("P/Cap. Giro", p_cap_giro))
indicators.append(("P/Ativ Circ Liq", p_ativ_circ_liq))
indicators.append(("EV / EBITDA", ev_ebitda))
indicators.append(("EV / EBIT", ev_ebit))

# per share
indicators.append(("LPA", lpa))
indicators.append(("VPA", vpa))

# margins and returns
indicators.append(("Marg. Bruta", marg_bruta))
indicators.append(("Marg. EBIT", marg_ebit))
indicators.append(("Marg. Líquida", marg_liq))
indicators.append(("EBIT / Ativo", ebit_over_ativo))
indicators.append(("ROIC", roic))
indicators.append(("ROE", roe))
indicators.append(("Liquidez Corr", liquidez_corr))
indicators.append(("Div Br/ Patrim", divbr_patrim))
indicators.append(("Giro Ativos", giro_ativos))

# print formatted
for name,val in indicators:
    if val is None:
        display = 'N/A'
    else:
        if name in ["Marg. Bruta","Marg. EBIT","Marg. Líquida","EBIT / Ativo","ROIC","ROE"]:
            display = f"{val:.2f} %"
        elif name in ["LPA","VPA"]:
            display = f"{val:.4f}"
        elif name in ["P/L","P/VP","P/EBIT","PSR","P/Ativos","P/Cap. Giro","P/Ativ Circ Liq","EV / EBITDA","EV / EBIT","Liquidez Corr","Div Br/ Patrim","Giro Ativos"]:
            display = f"{val:.2f}"
        else:
            display = f"{int(round(val))}"
    print(f"{name}: {display}")

# return indicators in structured form
result_list = []
for name,val in indicators:
    # map names to enum keys in required output
    key = name
    # convert percentages to numeric (float) without % for output schema expects number
    # But schema requires percentage fields to be numbers? It defines indicator value as number. However developer note said percentages must be reported with two decimals (XX.XX %). But JSON schema 'value' is number. The specified output format expects number. We'll output numeric values for everything; percentages as numeric percent values (e.g., 12.34 means percent).
    if val is None:
        v = None
    else:
        if name in ["Marg. Bruta","Marg. EBIT","Marg. Líquida","EBIT / Ativo","ROIC","ROE"]:
            v = round(val,2)
        elif name in ["LPA","VPA"]:
            v = round(val,4)
        else:
            v = round(val,2) if isinstance(val,float) else val
    # For mapping the exact indicator labels required by enum, adjust names
    # Create mapping
    mapping = {
        'Ativo':'Ativo',
        'Disponibilidades':'Disponibilidades',
        'Ativo Circulante':'Ativo Circulante',
        'Dí\u00fbv. Bruta':'Dív. Bruta',
        'Dív. Líquida':'Dív. Líquida',
        'Patrim. Líq':'Patrim. Líq',
        'Receita Líquida (12 meses)':'Receita Líquida (12 meses)',
        'EBIT (12 meses)':'EBIT (12 meses)',
        'Lucro Líquido (12 meses)':'Lucro Líquido (12 meses)',
        'Receita Líquida (3 meses)':'Receita Líquida (3 meses)',
        'EBIT (3 meses)':'EBIT (3 meses)',
        'Lucro Líquido (3 meses)':'Lucro Líquido (3 meses)',
        'P/L':'P/L',
        'P/VP':'P/VP',
        'P/EBIT':'P/EBIT',
        'PSR':'PSR',
        'P/Ativos':'P/Ativos',
        'P/Cap. Giro':'P/Cap. Giro',
        'P/Ativ Circ Liq':'P/Ativ Circ Liq',
        'EV / EBITDA':'EV / EBITDA',
        'EV / EBIT':'EV / EBIT',
        'LPA':'LPA',
        'VPA':'VPA',
        'Marg. Bruta':'Marg. Bruta',
        'Marg. EBIT':'Marg. EBIT',
        'Marg. Líquida':'Marg. Líquida',
        'EBIT / Ativo':'EBIT / Ativo',
        'ROIC':'ROIC',
        'ROE':'ROE',
        'Liquidez Corr':'Liquidez Corr',
        'Div Br/ Patrim':'Div Br/ Patrim',
        'Giro Ativos':'Giro Ativos'
    }
    enum_name = mapping.get(name, name)
    result_list.append({'indicator': enum_name, 'value': (v if v is not None else None)})

result_list
"} }
